title: Mirror column and Creation Log/Last Updated columns
excerpt:
Just a simple question. 
As far as I understand it is not possible to create items on another board with “Last updated” Columns and “Creation Log” columns. 
Ok. 
But you can’t use them as Mirror either? 
Why is that?

posts.author: AndresG (Andres)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just a simple question.
